html:
Exclusive to:

A Dock Piling is a decorative item for Docks with no further purpose. They can be found on the existing docks on Moon Quay.

A Dock Piling Kit is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update.

It is used to install a Dock Piling on a Dock. A blueprint for learning the recipe can be obtained from the Queen of Moon Quay.

Dock Piling

Object Info
Can be Burned
20
Crafting
×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"dock_woodposts_item"
“Aha! I thought the dock was missing something.”
–Wilson
“More fuel for the fi- I mean decoration for the dock!”
–Willow
“Posts make dock even stronger!”
–Wolfgang
“What would be the point?”
–Wendy
“IT SERVES NO PURPOSE, BUT DEAD TREES ARE PLEASING TO THE OPTICAL SENSORS”
–WX-78
“Unnecessary for a floating dock, but they do have a pleasant appearance.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looking at 'em is making me hungry.”
–Woodie
“Do I look like a common laborer to you?”
–Maxwell
“'Tis little more than set-dressing.”
–Wigfrid
“We almost forgot the posts!”
–Webber
“My dock needs a bit of garnish.”
–Warly
“Plant friends on dock.”
–Wormwood
“I don't like seeing \"spare\" parts lyin' around...”
–Winona
“I'll fix it in post, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Would look better with Pigman head on top, but still okay.”
–Wurt
“Some posts will make the dock look even more... dock-y.”
–Walter
“Are you supposed to place the support posts before or after? Oh well.”
–Wanda
A Dock Piling is a decorative item for Docks with no further purpose. They can be found on the existing docks on Moon Quay.
A Dock Piling Kit is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update.
It is used to install a Dock Piling on a Dock. A blueprint for learning the recipe can be obtained from the Queen of Moon Quay.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dock Piling là một vật trang trí dành cho Dock và không có mục đích gì thêm. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy trên các bến cảng hiện có trên Moon Quay.
title: Dock Piling

Oh well. |choose = wilson}} A '''Dock Piling''' is a decorative item for Docks with no further purpose. They can be found on the existing docks on [[Moon Quay]].
